package rulecoverage

func PositiveBuilderOrBufferRecreatedPerIteration() string {
    ruleID := "builder_or_buffer_recreated_per_iteration"
    family := "hot_path"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "strings.Builder, bytes.Buffer, or bytes.NewBuffer(...) constructions observed inside loops instead of being reset or reused."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
